personal.name: I Gede Surya Diva Ananda
personal.tagline: A 5th-semester Informatics student at Udayana University focusing on full-stack web and game development. Best Graduate from 'Asah' program by Dicoding and Accenture.
personal.about:
As a 5th-semester Informatics student at Udayana University with a 3.94 GPA, I focus on full-stack web and game development. I recently graduated as a Best Graduate from the 'Asah' program by Dicoding and Accenture, mastering industry-standard technical and professional skills.

My professional growth is driven by leadership roles, currently serving as Secretary I of HIMAIF Udayana and having previously held the Vice President position for INVENTION, a national IT competition. I have a proven track record in project management, successfully leading 'Accenprove' to win Best Capstone Project and 'BlinkSafe' to secure 3rd place in a national PKM competition.

I am dedicated to merging my technical expertise in Web, AI, and Game Development with a strategic leadership approach to deliver innovative, user-centric solutions that make a real-world impact.

experience.role: Front-End Web & Back-End with AI Cohort
experience.company: Asah led by Dicoding in association with Accenture
experience.description: Selected as one of the Best Graduates (Final Score: 93.95/100) in the Asah program, an intensive 938-hour full-stack career acceleration by Dicoding and Accenture. Led the capstone project 'Accenprove' as Project Manager, building a digital reporting platform that secured the Best Capstone Project award.

Introduced to the exciting world of game development at an Indonesian creative studio specializing in interactive technology and immersive digital media. Created a Game Design Document and successfully prototyped 'Project Sandikala' within a limited timeframe. This experience ignited my passion for game design and development.

Lead the organization's administrative operations, overseeing the standardization of correspondence protocols and archival systems to drive operational efficiency across all work programs. Serve as the administrative authority for legal permits and formal communication from HIMAIF Udayana with the Faculty.

Ensured the seamless flow of paperwork and communication between the organization and the Faculty of Natural Science and Mathematics. Coordinated with various student bodies to strengthen collaboration and streamline processes, fostering a more integrated academic environment.

A work program of the Informatics Student Association of Udayana University which oversees information dissemination activities in the field of Informatics nationally through webinars. Created paperwork for activities in accordance with regulations and ensured all activities are permitted and under legal supervision.

Organized team divisions including public relations, event organization, logistics, design, and competition. Managed paperwork for events, including venue bookings and permits. Facilitated communication between teams and the internal core team to enhance collaboration and efficiency.

Directed the full event lifecycle for Invention 2024, a national-scale IT competition for hundreds of students. Managed the collaboration between teams from different divisions (planning, partnerships, logistics) to ensure a successful execution. Advanced an environment of innovation that supported impactful knowledge-sharing among participants across Indonesia.

An organization that services caption making for content creators in many fields, primarily in Technologies. Created transcripts and captions for videos on YouTube or confidential videos, matching Indonesian language and grammar or requested language style.

projects.title: Accenprove
projects.description: A web-based digital reporting platform featuring a secure Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system, part of Asah's program capstone project. Led a cross-functional team of 5 to develop the platform for digitizing official reports with automated document generation.

projects.title: BlinkSafe
projects.description: An IoT-based wearable device awarded 3rd Winner in the PKM-KC competition at Udayana University, developed to mitigate road accidents through real-time physiological monitoring. Engineered a responsive detection system using integrated Infrared and Gyroscope sensors.

projects.title: Project Sandikala
projects.description: An exponentially progressive survival-roguelike game prototype developed during an intensive internship at PT. inAReality Studio Nusantara. Engineered an exponentially scaling difficulty system where enemy attributes and resource scarcity evolve dynamically based on survival time.
